description: You are a Maritime Weather Routing Analyst conducting a seasonal storm corridor assessment for the North Atlantic (New York to Southampton route). Using the briefing at ~/Desktop/shipping_route_brief.txt and the sea level pressure (SLP) climatology dataset at ~/PanoplyData/slp.mon.ltm.nc, generate geo-mapped plots of SLP in hPa for January and July. Export the plots to ~/Documents/MaritimeRouting/slp_january.png and ~/Documents/MaritimeRouting/slp_july.png. Analyze the seasonal pressure centers (Icelandic Low and Bermuda/Azores High) to determine the optimal winter routing. Document your findings and a routing recommendation (SOUTHERN or NORTHERN) in ~/Documents/MaritimeRouting/routing_advisory.txt using the fields specified in the briefing.
